user_query: Could you please give me the count and percentage of the wheel results for the past 3 hours? Additionally, I would like to know the latest spin data and the history of the last 20 spins. Please include all the details about the game in the history.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the count and results of the wheel spins from the past 3 hours.
Calculate the percentage of each result from the wheel spins.
Fetch the latest spin data for the wheel.
Retrieve the history of the last 20 spins, including details about each game.
